evals.prompt: Set up a base stylesheet for a small personal site.
evals.expected_output: Uses system-ui font, color-scheme, and minimal defaults — no font-size reset on :root or body.
expectations: Does not set font-size on :root, html, or body
Does not declare color or background-color on body

evals.prompt: Make images and videos responsive so they never overflow their container.
evals.expected_output: Uses max-inline-size: 100% and block-size: auto on img, svg, video, and iframe.
expectations: Uses block-size: auto instead of height: auto

evals.prompt: Add smooth scrolling to the page.
evals.expected_output: Wraps scroll-behavior: smooth in a prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference media query.
expectations: Sets scroll-behavior: smooth inside that media query
Does not apply scroll-behavior: smooth unconditionally

evals.prompt: Add a hover pointer cursor to buttons, checkboxes, and select elements.
evals.expected_output: Uses a single :where() rule targeting interactive elements.
expectations: Uses :where() to avoid specificity side effects
Targets button, input[type='checkbox'], input[type='radio'], select, and label
